WITH monthly_net AS (
    SELECT 
        ct.customer_id,
        strftime('%Y-%m-01', ct.txn_date) AS month_start,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ct.txn_type = 'deposit' THEN ct.txn_amount ELSE 0 END) -
        SUM(CASE WHEN ct.txn_type = 'withdrawal' THEN ct.txn_amount ELSE 0 END) AS net_amount
    FROM customer_transactions ct
    GROUP BY ct.customer_id, strftime('%Y-%m-01', ct.txn_date)
),
